nasb.text: Go, say to Jeroboam, ‘Thus says the Lord God of Israel, “Because I exalted you from among the people and made you leader over My people Israel,

esv.text: Go, tell Jeroboam, ‘Thus says the Lord, the God of Israel: “Because I exalted you from among the people and made you leader over my people Israel

cnv.text: 你去告訴耶羅波安：‘耶和華以色列的　神這樣說：我從人民中提拔了你，又立了你作治理我的子民以色列的領袖。

ccb.text: 你回去告诉耶罗波安，‘以色列的上帝耶和华说，我从百姓中擢升你，立你做我以色列子民的王。
